name: Green Tomato and Onion Pickles
recipeIngredient: 4 quart Green Tomatoes, Halved into 1-inch pieces
1 1/2 quarts Medium Onions, Peeled and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the granulated sugar, cider vinegar, salt, mustard seed, whole allspice, and whole cloves in a large pot.
2. Tie the allspice and cloves together in a cheesecloth bag.
3. Add the cheesecloth bag to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
5. Add the halved green tomatoes and chopped onions to the pot.
6. Continue boiling, uncovered, for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are just tender, stirring occasionally to lift slices from the bottom to the surface.
7. Remove the cheesecloth bag containing spices.
8. Pack the pickled vegetables into clean, hot jars.
9. Pour the hot liquid over the vegetables in the jars, sealing tightly.
10. Process the jars in a boiling water bath for the appropriate time as per your conditions (consult with an extension agent for canning guidelines).
YIELD: 6 Pints
